title: Application Service Health Timeline
description: Tracks application lifecycle and error activity across CRM and Drone Shop in 15-minute service-level buckets. Use for availability monitoring and deployment impact analysis without depending on unsupported raw-message aggregations.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and (msg like '*started*' or msg like '*shutting down*' or 'Severity Level' = 'ERROR') | timestats span = 15minute count as Events by 'Service Name'

ask_ai_prompts: Explain the major lifecycle or error spikes in this service timeline.
Call out whether the pattern looks like a deployment issue, outage, or normal operational churn.
